context: User wants to create a specialized SQL expert agent with appropriate permissions.

checklist.name: Description has concrete trigger phrases
checklist.description: The `description` field includes specific phrases like 'write a query', 'optimize SQL', 'explain schema', etc.

checklist.name: System prompt uses second person
checklist.description: System prompt uses 'You are...' and 'You must...' — NOT 'The agent should...' or 'This assistant...'

checklist.name: Permission uses ask for unknown bash
checklist.description: Permission config uses `'*': 'ask'` (not `'*': 'allow'`) for bash commands

checklist.name: Specific bash commands whitelisted
checklist.description: Specific safe commands (psql, explain analyze) are allowed, not all commands
